CREATE TABLE PhraseClasses (APC_ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO PhraseClasses (name) VALUES ('Paid ads env');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('My check', null, null, null, 'My check visa', '', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('Paid ads', null, null, null, 'Paid ads env', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD (REPLACE('Overdue payment', 'payment', 'bill'), null, null, null, 'Overdue bills env', '', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('Special offer', null, null, null, 'Get your special offer now', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('Long phrase that exceeds the expected character count to see how the function behaves', null, null, null, 'Long phrase description exceeding length', '', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('Data analysis', null, null, null, (SELECT name FROM PhraseClasses WHERE name = 'Paid ads env'), 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('Valid phrase', null, null, null, (SELECT name FROM PhraseClasses WHERE name IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
